mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, task_id, actor_id, type, old_value, new_value, source, at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM activities WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY at DESC, id DESC
SELECT FROM activities WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND type = 'SPRINT_CHANGED' AND (old_value = #{sid} OR new_value = #{sid}) ORDER BY at ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO activities (tenant_id, task_id, actor_id, type, old_value, new_value, source, at) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{a.taskId}, #{a.actorId}, #{a.type}, #{a.oldValue}, #{a.newValue}, #{a.source}, #{a.at})
mapper.update: UPDATE activities SET task_id = #{a.taskId}, actor_id = #{a.actorId}, type = #{a.type}, old_value = #{a.oldValue}, new_value = #{a.newValue}, source = #{a.source}, at = #{a.at} WHERE id = #{a.id} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM activities WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId}
